title: Luffy Refuses to Stay Down
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on luffy refuses to stay down, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Luffy Refuses to Stay Down. Luffy survives his first loss to Crocodile and begins the long road back into the fight for Alabasta. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: You and I are pirates in completely different leagues...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Those of you who carry the name of "D"...

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: ...Perhaps it was a pointless question to ask.

summary: This part develops luffy refuses to stay down and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
